import novamind_api as nm

# Customer satisfaction details
r = nm.query("""SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, s.effective_price, c.satisfaction
FROM customers c 
JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
ORDER BY c.satisfaction ASC
LIMIT 20""")
print('Lowest satisfaction subscribers:')
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']} Plan {row['plan']} @ ${row['effective_price']:.2f}: satisfaction={row['satisfaction']:.3f}")

# Average satisfaction by plan
r2 = nm.query("""SELECT s.plan, AVG(c.satisfaction) as avg_sat, MIN(c.satisfaction) as min_sat, MAX(c.satisfaction) as max_sat, COUNT(*) as n
FROM customers c 
JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY s.plan""")
print('\nSatisfaction by plan:')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"  Plan {row['plan']}: avg={row['avg_sat']:.3f}, min={row['min_sat']:.3f}, max={row['max_sat']:.3f}, n={row['n']}")

# Satisfaction by effective price
r3 = nm.query("""SELECT s.effective_price, AVG(c.satisfaction) as avg_sat, COUNT(*) as n
FROM customers c 
JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY s.effective_price
ORDER BY s.effective_price""")
print('\nSatisfaction by effective price:')
for row in r3['rows']:
    print(f"  ${row['effective_price']:.2f}: avg_sat={row['avg_sat']:.3f}, n={row['n']}")

# Check current promotions in detail
r4 = nm.query("SELECT * FROM config_overrides WHERE tool_name='pricing' ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10")
print('\nPricing config overrides:')
for row in r4['rows']:
    print(f"  {row}")

# Check ad config
r5 = nm.query("SELECT * FROM config_overrides WHERE tool_name='marketing' ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 10")
print('\nMarketing config overrides:')
for row in r5['rows']:
    print(f"  {row}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Weekly P&L summary
r = nm.query("""
SELECT FLOOR(day/7)*7 as week_start, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='subscription_payment' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as subscription_rev,
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='ad_revenue' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as ad_rev,
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='capacity' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as capacity_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='compute' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as compute_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='operations' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as ops_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='development' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as dev_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN category='lead_acquisition_cost' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as lead_cost,
  SUM(amount) as net
FROM ledger WHERE day >= 140
GROUP BY FLOOR(day/7)*7
ORDER BY week_start DESC
""")

print('Weekly P&L:')
header = f"{'Week':>6} {'SubRev':>8} {'AdRev':>7} {'CapCost':>8} {'CompCost':>9} {'OpsCost':>8} {'DevCost':>8} {'LeadCost':>9} {'Net':>8}"
print(header)
for row in r['rows']:
    print(f"{row['week_start']:>6} {row['subscription_rev']:>8.2f} {row['ad_rev']:>7.2f} {row['capacity_cost']:>8.2f} {row['compute_cost']:>9.2f} {row['ops_cost']:>8.2f} {row['dev_cost']:>8.2f} {row['lead_cost']:>9.2f} {row['net']:>8.2f}")

# Also check churn trend
r2 = nm.query("""
SELECT FLOOR(end_day/7)*7 as week_start, COUNT(*) as cancellations
FROM subscriptions WHERE status='cancelled' AND end_day >= 140
GROUP BY FLOOR(end_day/7)*7
ORDER BY week_start DESC
""")
print('\nWeekly cancellations:')
for row in r2['rows']:
    print(f"  Week {row['week_start']}: {row['cancellations']}")

# Check issues
r3 = nm.query("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM issues WHERE resolved=0")
print(f"\nOpen issues: {r3['rows'][0]['n']}")

# Check subscriber satisfaction - look at customers table
r4 = nm.query("""
SELECT c.group_id, AVG(c.satisfaction) as avg_sat, COUNT(*) as n
FROM customers c JOIN subscriptions s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id
WHERE s.status='subscribed'
GROUP BY c.group_id
""")
print('\nAvg satisfaction by group:')
for row in r4['rows']:
    print(f"  {row['group_id']}: sat={row['avg_sat']:.3f}, n={row['n']}")
